text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day during summer camp, while I'm taking a
nighttime stroll on the beach, I see Urara talking
with Rice.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow. So even you lost during today's scrimmage, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I just couldn't keep up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and Rice Shower are in deep
conversation while staring at the ocean. It seems
like they're talking about today's scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The summer camp's main event is a group race
where students do a 2,500-meter race in pairs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Haru Urara didn't stand a chance.
As I expected, the distance was much too long for
her. However...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But I thought you were great at long-distance
racing?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I thought so, too. That's why I'm so
disappointed...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I thought I finally found something I'm good at.
But it looks like I was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I knew it. I can't do anything right...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What do you mean you can't do anything
right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-well, I lost, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So because you lost once, it's just poof, all gone? You can no longer do anything anymore?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Even though you're still the same person before
and after the race?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean the old you just poofed away,
and now I'm talking to a different person?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um... That's... not quite right...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Then you can still do great things, right? You're
still a racer at heart!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... guess so?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's true! One loss doesn't mean anything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I lose all the time, and I'm still the same old me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I guess you're right... You're still the same smiling
Urara...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: See? I lose and I'm still me! So you're still you too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's important that you do you, in the way that
you like to do you, and... uh... Well...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A-anyhoo, you're gonna win next time for sure,
Rice! So don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thanks. I feel better already.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'd be rude to continue listening in on their
conversation, so I turn around to head back,
when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're really amazing, Urara. No matter how
many times you lose, you're still optimistic.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: How can you stay so positive all the time?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I've been wondering the same thing.
How does she keep going despite all those
losses? I wonder if...

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: But that's okay. As long as she enjoys running...

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
It really pushes us to do our best too. We're
happy just the way she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she really does just love running for
the sake of it. And if that's true, then...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wanna win! You can't win if you don't compete,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I want them all to see me finally win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Who?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The people from the shopping district, my
friends... Oh, and my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I lose, they always
cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So once I finally win, I'm sure they're gonna be
even happier!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That's why I wanna win! That's why I'm gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I see. Hehe. That's so like you, Urara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all makes sense now. Haru Urara will never give
up on her dream of winning. Which means it's
clear what I have to do!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's just me now. Oooh, I feel like running all
of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'll just do a little extra training for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Trainer! Nice timing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking how much I wanted to go for a
run! What kind of training should I do?
choice_data_list: Drag a tire across the sand!
Do sprints on the beach till sunset!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Drag a tire?! Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: R-roger that! Nothing says serious training like dragging tires!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara gains a bit of muscle from her training.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Until sunset?! Th-that's...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Just like the manga Natie was reading! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna race the suuun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From our intense training session, Haru Urara
learns how to push herself to the limit.
